title: pelargonium × comptoniae
intro: Pelargonium × comptoniae, also known as Cape Pelargonium or Compton's Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × comptoniae include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make a variety of remedies, such as cold and flu relief sprays and digestive supplements.
